name: Swift Rush
pvpDetail: Meta-essential for Turn 1 priority. Any unit targeting the 185+ SPD breakpoint needs this set.

name: Revelation
pvpDetail: Higher value in Inferno content. Pure damage ceiling — no sustain trade-off.

name: Wellspring
pvpDetail: Ideal for Tiamat and Lingluo. The HP% stat also scales Sania Vengeful Thorn's DoT output.

name: Bulwark
pvpDetail: Essential for Rahu's DEF-scaling damage nodes. Do not run Rahu without full Bulwark.

name: Crit
pvpDetail: Foundational for Gray and Lian. Hits the 85% effective Crit Rate threshold with 2 substats invested.

name: Harvest
pvpDetail: 100% focus on Defense Penetration. Best-in-slot for Arena and Hyperlink PvP modes only.
